## Documentation

This report is intended for interpretation of multi-omics data from a single human tumor sample.

<br>

::: {.panel-tabset}

### Gene/variant annotation resources {#sec-resources}

The variant interpretation procedures performed in this cancer genome report are relying upon multiple tools and knowledge resources, as outlined below. 

::: {.callout-important}

## Licensing note

Some resources (highlighted below) require specific licensing agreements if you plan to utilize their data (and thus this report) in a commercial, non-academic setting, or for patient
services in a hospital setting.

:::


::: {.callout-note title="Dataset versions" collapse="true"}

* __PCGR databundle version__

  * __`r pcg_report$settings$reference_data$version`__

* __Databases/datasets__ 
```{r list_db}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

i <- 1
ref_datasets <- pcg_report$settings$reference_data$source_metadata
for(i in 1:NROW(ref_datasets)) {
  source_full <- ref_datasets[i,"source"]
  source <- ref_datasets[i,"source_abbreviation"]
  description <- ref_datasets[i,"source_description"]
  url <- ref_datasets[i,"source_url"]
  version <- ref_datasets[i,"source_version"]
  license <- ref_datasets[i, "source_license"]
  license_url <- ref_datasets[i, "source_license_url"]
  source_type <- ref_datasets[i, "source_type"]
  
  ## temporary fix for outdated ACMG URL (geneOncoX needs update):
  if (source == "acmg_sf") {
    url <- "https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/37347242/"
  }
  wflow <- ref_datasets[i, "wflow"]
  if (!(stringr::str_detect(
    wflow,"pcgr"))) {
    next
  }
  
  if(source == "oncokb" &
     pcg_report$settings$conf$oncokb$run == 1){
    version <- 
      paste(pcg_report$settings$conf$oncokb$data_version," - ",
            pcg_report$settings$conf$oncokb$data_release_date)
  }
  
  ## some sources are duplicated (used as gene-level and variant-level 
  ## annotation resources), but we only want to   list them once in the documentation:
  if (source == "dbnsfp" & source_type == "gene") {
    next
  }
  if (source == "depmap" & source_type != "other") {
    next
  }
  if (source == "tcga_pancan_2018" & source_type == "phenotype") {
    next
  }
  
  s <- ""
  if (is.na(version)) {
    if (!is.na(license_url)) {
      s <- glue::glue(
        "    * [{source_full}]({url}) - {description} - [{license}]({license_url})")
    }else{
      s <- glue::glue(
        "    * [{source_full}]({url}) - {description} - {license}")
    }
  }else{
    if (!is.na(license_url)) {
      if (source == "cgc" | source == "gepa" | source == "dbnsfp" | source == "oncokb") {
        s <- glue::glue(
          "    * [{source_full}]({url}) - {description} (<b>{version}</b>) - [<b>{license}</b>]({license_url})")
      }else{
        s <- glue::glue(
          "    * [{source_full}]({url}) - {description} (<b>{version}</b>) - [{license}]({license_url})")
      }
    }else{
      s <- glue::glue(
        "    * [{source_full}]({url}) - {description} (<b>{version}</b>) - {license}"
      )
    }
  }
  if (s != "") {
    cat(s, sep = "\n")
  }
}

```

:::

### Report content

::: {.callout-note title="Variant oncogenicity classification" collapse="true"}

`r pcgrr::oncogenicity_doc_note()`

<br>

__A note on variant loss-of-function annotation__

`r pcgrr::lof_doc_note()`

:::

::: {.callout-note title="Variant actionability classification" collapse="true"}

`r pcgrr::actionability_doc_note()`

:::

::: {.callout-note title="Mutational signature analysis" collapse="true"}

`r pcgrr::mutational_signatures_doc_note()` 

:::

::: {.callout-note title="Tumor mutational burden (TMB) analysis" collapse="true"}

`r pcgrr::tmb_doc_note()`

:::

::: {.callout-note title="MSI classification" collapse="true"}

`r pcgrr::msi_doc_note()`

:::

::: {.callout-note title="RNA fusion analysis" collapse="true"}

`r pcgrr::fusion_doc_note()`

:::

::: {.callout-note title="Gene expression analysis" collapse="true"}

`r pcgrr::expression_doc_note()`

:::

::: {.callout-note title="Two-hit detection" collapse="true"}

`r pcgrr::twohit_doc_note()`

:::

:::
